title: Gauge-group emergence by flat-Cartan forcing (post-rollback)
statement: Gauge-group emergence via flat-Cartan forcing stands at proof-sketch grade. The 2026-04-30 rollback is canonical: the sub-task-2 closure was falsified by $c_2(E)=-40\neq 0$ on canonical $\mathbb{CP}^2$ (Math174); Mechanism A is refuted; Mechanism B (cubic equivariance) is valid scaffolding but insufficient alone.
scope: Proof sketch with named gaps. Tier capped while GAP-1 (vacuum uniqueness) is open, since gauge/matter topology may depend on vacuum selection.
falsifier: Alternative-geometry routes also obstructed by a nonvanishing c_2(E) class, refuting the mechanism class.
no_overclaim: Any 'closure completed' reading of the legacy 2026-04-29 record; the rollback is canonical.
next_action: Recovery via alternative geometries (legacy Task #156 lineage) registered as a fresh scaffold.
